title: Step 1: Create a New Edge Object
description:
Step 1: Create a New Edge Object

Step 1: Create a New Edge Object

	Click the [All Tools] the  [New
	 Edge] button on the Vision Guide toolbar.
	Move the mouse over the image display.  You will
	 see the mouse pointer change to the Edge object icon.
	Continue moving the mouse until the icon is at the
	 desired position in the Image Display area, then click the left mouse
	 button to create the object.
	Notice that a name for the
	 object is automatically created.  In the example, it is called
	 "Edge01" because this is the first Edge object created for
	 this sequence. (We will explain how to change the name later.)
